title: Cuba says it will release over 2,000 prisoners, as U.S. keeps up pressure
summary_full: The move, described by the communist government as a “humanitarian and sovereign gesture,” comes as the U.S. enforces a crippling oil blockade on the island.
summary_public: The move, described by the communist government as a “humanitarian and sovereign gesture,” comes as the U.S. enforces a crippling oil blockade on the island.
